content.problemStatement:
You are given an array of integers AAA. Your task is to write a program that inserts a new element into the array at a specified index.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer NNN, representing the size of the array.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers, representing the elements of the array.
The third line contains an integer III, representing the index (0-based indexing) at which the new element should be inserted.
The fourth line contains an integer XXX, representing the value of the element to be inserted.


Output Format
Print the modified array with the newly inserted element.
